curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge of the GHSA security advisory fix into main. Three source files changed: index.php (removed unsanitized $loginname from log messages in 3 places), lib/Froxlor/FroxlorLogger.php (added preg_replace sanitization in logAction before storing), and lib/Froxlor/Api/Commands/SysLog.php (added preg_replace sanitization in listing when reading log entries from database). No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. The pre-assigned xss class is correct — CWE-79/CWE-80 both map to XSS, and the patch clearly addresses stored XSS via unsanitized user input in log messages rendered in the admin panel.
